error: The sandbox was not found: This error is likely due to sandbox timeout. You can modify the sandbox timeout by passing 'timeout' when starting the sandbox or calling '.set_timeout' on the sandbox with the desired timeout.

p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 repo CI/CD checks as pass_to_pass gates: test_repo_typecheck (npm run tsc), test_repo_check_deps (npm run check-deps), test_repo_lint_tests (npm run lint-tests), test_repo_build (npm run build). All verified passing on base commit 72310c757282e397fcd280e85602adcdf0d581ca.

validate.notes: Fixed two test bugs: 1) test_download_cancel_method was checking braceDepth AFTER counting braces, so it never found cancel() at depth 1. Fixed by checking depth BEFORE counting. 2) test_context_close_cancels_downloads found 'disposeBrowserContext' in a comment instead of the actual call. Fixed by searching for 'send('Target.disposeBrowserContext'' instead. All checks now pass.
